title: MoonsuOverhaul
description:
MoonsuOverhaul
The reinvention of the forge version, MoonsuExperience! You will find a wide variety of content enriching every aspect of minecraft, but without losing the essence of the original.
body:
![https://discord.gg/QGeayqNVeb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f31a1cde03cd2b085af8b21a4c0af23b6a38af70.gif)
## Moons, it's time to get ready for "MoonsuOverhaul"
![Moon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17d38e90370e40b41c265daa246dc0b9159f0747.png)

The new odyssey that will take you into unexplored minecraft territories. Epic challenges await everywhere, with new and formidable bosses ready to put the best warriors at their limits.

Dive into the deepest of new caves in search of exotic minerals that will expand your crafting skills like never before. Forge and craft armor and weapons of all kinds. Enjoy the new landscapes with a reinvented terrain generation that will present familiar biomes with a fresh look and more!

### Credits to the author of the mod that visually improves the grass and roads:[SuperBetterGrass](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/super-better-grass) 

<details>
<summary>Español</summary>

## Moons, es momento de que se preparen para "MoonsuOverhaul" 
La nueva odisea que los llevará a adentrarse a territorios desconocidos de minecraft. Desafíos épicos acechan en todo lugar, con nuevos y temibles jefes dispuestos a poner a prueba a los mejores guerreros.

Adéntrate en la profundidades de las nuevas cuevas en busca de exóticos minerales que expandirán sus habilidades de artesanía como nunca antes. Forja y craftea armaduras y armas de todo tipo. ¡Disfruta de los nuevos paisajes con una generación de terreno reinventada que presentará biomas familiares con una mirada fresca y más!

</details>
